operator_notes: Deferred anti-scope items stay deferred until continuation review approves them.
Every approved post-v1 upgrade must remain evidence-backed rather than roadmap-default.

rule_evidence.trigger_summary: Live broker latency and operational friction prove the first broker lane is the bottleneck.
rule_evidence.approval_scope: Allow a second live broker lane only after continuation review.

rule_evidence.trigger_summary: Parity and live diagnostics show the existing feed is insufficient.
rule_evidence.approval_scope: Allow a second live market-data feed only after continuation review.

rule_evidence.trigger_summary: One-host topology fails live SLOs for infrastructure reasons.
rule_evidence.approval_scope: Allow multi-host infrastructure only after continuation review.

rule_evidence.trigger_summary: The live stack redesign needed for depth-aware or sub-minute strategies is explicitly approved.
rule_evidence.approval_scope: Allow sub-minute or depth-aware strategies only after continuation review.

rule_evidence.trigger_summary: One-bundle live operation is stable and economically justified for controlled expansion.
rule_evidence.approval_scope: Allow multiple active live bundles only after continuation review.
